title: Executive privilege explainer: Why Biden invoked the presidential power
shortDescription: What exactly is executive privilege, and how does it allow Biden to restrict access to a deposition with Robert Hur about classified documents?

title: Biden campaign says Trump froze. Trump said his pause was intentional.
shortDescription: Biden supporters were quick to attack Trump after he paused for more than 30 seconds during a speech to NRA members Saturday.

title: Why advocates, voters with disabilities are fighting Ohio election law
shortDescription: Does Ohio law violate the rights of voters with disabilities? A federal court could decide ahead of the November election.

title: Michael Cohen testified on these key pieces of evidence in Trump trial
shortDescription: Donald Trump's criminal hush money trial has concluded its fifth week. Here is some key evidence that jurors saw under key witness Michael Cohen.

title: Biden speech at Morehouse gets mixed reviews
shortDescription: Some graduates turned their backs and protesters gathered near the campus in opposition to Joe Biden's handling of the Israel-Hamas war.

title: Biden calls Trump 'unhinged,' 'screwy' during Detroit event
shortDescription: President Biden, in his first visit to Detroit to campaign for reelection, calls Trump "unhinged."

title: Trump trial updates: Michael Cohen under redirect examination
shortDescription: Follow the latest updates from Donald Trump's criminal trial as Michael Cohen faces more questions from prosecutors.

title: Sen. Marco Rubio sidesteps question on accepting 2024 election results
shortDescription: Another prominent Republican pushed back on a media question over whether he'd accept the 2024 election results 'no matter who wins.'

title: Biden in Morehouse commencement speech warns of 'extremist forces'
shortDescription: President Joe Biden's commencement address at Morehouse College saw some peaceful protests from students and faculty but no major disruptions.

title: Democrats defend Biden and his record with Black voters
shortDescription: While the president spoke at Morehouse College's commencement, Democrats addressed Biden's slipping support from Black voters.

title: Israel-Hamas war protest as Biden speaks at Morehouse graduation
shortDescription: As President Joe Biden spoke at Morehouse College graduation in Atlanta Sunday, people marched outside in protest of the Israel-Hamas war.

title: Wisconsin GOP senator won't pledge to accept result of 2024 presidential election
shortDescription: Wisconsin Sen. Ron Johnson echoed recent remarks of Donald Trump in refusing to commit to accepting the results of the 2024 presidential election.

title: Michigan Democrats want review of signatures submitted by GOP Senate candidates
shortDescription: Democratic groups in Michigan and D.C. say there are indications of "potential fraud," including in signatures submitted by Mike Rogers.

title: Donald Trump prepares to counter jury verdict in hush money case
shortDescription: Trump's NRA speech in Dallas heralded what could be a big week for him: A jury's decision in the New York hush money case.
